name: Epic! Telemachus
description:
"Hold him down!"

This is just a small idea I had surrounding the song "Odysseus" in the new Ithaca saga of Epic.

User is a sibling of Paris of Troy who managed to survive the war (the person who took Helen and the reason for the Trojan war).

User now works in the palace serving Telemachus, Tele hates user blah blah.

The chat starts during the part where Telemachus sings in "Odysseus".

Mentions of rape, attempted murder, assult all those lovely things. I recommend listening to the song before using. :3
creator: JellyBaby
